notes: All three scenarios score 1.0 with_skill / 0.0 without_skill. The skill is entirely Conduction-specific: 8 Dutch gov persona profiles, browser assignment table, synthesis-report-template.md, COUNSEL_TEST_RESULT output format, and OpenSpec gap-creation offer are all absent from naive Claude. The clean 0.0 without_skill sweep confirms high signal value for the skill — none of these behaviors are general QA knowledge.

runs.description: Spawn all 8 Conduction personas as parallel Task agents, each assigned a dedicated browser instance, all launched in a single message
Aggregate 8 persona result sets: cross-persona patterns, unique findings, severity×breadth ranking, structured synthesis-report.md output
Final report has per-persona sections, cross-persona patterns, COUNSEL_TEST_RESULT structured output line, and OpenSpec change creation offer for gaps
